items.title: As AI companies race to go public, who else is along for the ride?
items.summary: Startups are trying to "ride that SpaceX IPO wave."

items.title: TechCrunch Mobility: SpaceX rockets past Tesla
items.summary: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

items.title: The new Sonos Play has become my go-to desk and kitchen speaker
items.summary: The new Sonos Play can act as a portable speaker inside and outside your home.

items.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
items.summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

items.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
items.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

items.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
items.summary: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.

items.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
items.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

items.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
items.summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

items.title: This thin under-pillow speaker helped me fall asleep without earbuds
items.summary: I’ve struggled with insomnia since I was very young. Like many chronic overthinkers, I tend to fall asleep best when my mind is occupied by something else, such as podcasts, YouTube compilations, or my personal favorite:

items.title: The FBI built its own replica small town to simulate real-world cyberattacks
items.summary: Hidden inside a building in Alabama, the FBI has created its own small town as a dedicated cyber training ground for simulating cyberattacks.

items.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
items.summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

items.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a b

items.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know

items.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
items.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

items.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
items.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

items.title: SpaceX IPO closes up 19% and delivers the world’s first trillionaire
items.summary: The company made its heavily anticipated debut on Friday, trading higher than its initial $135 IPO price.

items.title: SpaceX president Gwynne Shotwell just gave another hint at a Tesla merger
items.summary: A SpaceX-Tesla merger seems inevitable.

items.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
items.summary: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

items.title: Robinhood sees ‘record-breaking’ traffic after SpaceX stock debuts
items.summary: The trading platform says some customers experienced intermittent disruptions, but those issues have resolved.

items.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI’s hot IPO summer
items.summary: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenA
